name: Hamburger Spinach Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the spinach.
2. Mix the cream cheese, sour cream, milk, and minced onion in a separate bowl until softened.
3. Cook the noodles in boiling water for 10 minutes. Drain thoroughly.
4. Brown the ground beef and drain well. Add the tomato sauce, sugar, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Stir until combined. Add the cooked noodles and heat through.
5. In a 2-quart casserole dish, layer half of the meat-noodle mixture (about 1/2). Top with half of the cream cheese mixture.
6. Sprinkle with spinach leaves.
7. Cover the dish with the remaining meat-noodle mixture and top with the rest of the cream cheese.
8. Spread shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the top.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. Remove from the oven and cover completely with additional cheddar cheese.
10. Return to the oven uncovered until the cheese melts completely (about 5-10 minutes). Serves 4.
